CustomField.label: Expiry
CustomField.description: The instant this OTP challenge stops being valid (design section 2.3/6.4, D-013). Set by VS_OtpService.issue() to now plus the configured validity window (VS_Setting__mdt.OtpExpiryMinutes, falling back to a safe default -- never a hardcoded magic number, rules/20). verify() rejects any code presented at or after this time with a user-actionable EXPIRED message, independent of the attempt counter. NOTE: design section 2.3 names this field VS_Expires_At__c; this ticket (VS-13) AC specifies VS_Expiry__c -- built to the AC and flagged for reviewer reconciliation. Optional (not required) so it can carry FLS on the test-context permission set (D-028).
